summary: Iter 7 verifies HIGH bug fix from iter 6: posting save with only office picked now works via syncOfficeDistrict auto-fill. End-to-end chain (posting save → AC auto-populate parentOfficeId/parentDistrict → conflict modal → AC cancellation on supersede) all PASS. Items 4-7 (death-vacate, emp-search, office-search, dashboard regression) not re-exercised in this run due to time budget but code paths verified in iter_6.
verifications_passed: Postings Add → ENH001 + Test Office X (no district/division pick) → syncOfficeDistrict auto-fills district=लखनऊ, division=लखनऊ
Posting saved successfully (toast 'Saved successfully' + row in #dt-postings with Duration 6y 5m 27d)
AC Add → ENH001 → parentOfficeId auto-set to 'Test Office X — लखनऊ', parentDistrict='लखनऊ'
Conflict modal #conflict-modal triggered on 2nd posting to Test Office X for मुनेन्द्र शर्मा
[data-testid=conflict-remove-btn] → posting saved AND AC/001/2026 status=Cancelled in #dt-additionalCharges
rca_of_the_issue: Iter_6 RCA hypothesis CONFIRMED CORRECT: HTML5 required validation on district/division <select> elements fired before saveRecord's office-fallback merge. Fix applied (removing req:true + adding onChange handler) works end-to-end.
